usage_state._deprecates: weekly_sonnet_pct — fiction under pay-as-you-go; do not reintroduce
usage_state._scope_note: Governor scope = API track ONLY (cost-log.jsonl, SaSMaSTeR org, $500/mo console cap). OUT OF SCOPE by design: (1) $200 claude.ai consumer usage-credit cap, (2) ~$106/mo Max subscription base. Do NOT fold these into governor math.
usage_state._tier_logic: today_spend<15 NORMAL | 15-25 WARN (slack, normal routing) | 25-40 FALLBACK (Sonnet exec->Haiku; model-pinned exempt) | >=40 PAUSE (halt Sonnet, only Haiku+Opus-pinned run, requires human resume). MTD>=400 MONTHLY_PACE_WARN regardless of daily tier; MTD>=500 align to console hard cap.

recommendations.action: Prompt caching wired on intel agents + Dr. Scoop — verify first cache_creation_input_tokens > 0 on next cron run
Batch short tasks (<5K token context) into single Claude Code sessions to amortize system-prompt overhead — reduces per-task input tokens by ~30%
Cache ~/.claude/skills/user/*.md reads with cache_control: ephemeral on first load — skill files are 2-15KB and re-read every session uncached

formula.amber_floor_rule: any component at 0% forces health ring to amber minimum regardless of aggregate
